title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Cuemath Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Cuemath Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? Cuemath Advisory Limited in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cuemath Advisory Limited:
Cuemath Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath Advisory Limited!
